title: The Dead Guy
overview: Louisiana Mediumistic Communicator and FBI Agent Justice Brown is burdened with the task of solving the cases of three different female vocal apparitions, who allege that they were killed and buried in Bar Harbor, Maine by a local park ranger named Auggie Doggett. And now Agent Brown must bring the killer to justice.
